base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_hunchback_fleaman_jump — a character from 1986 castlevania. Igor-style hunchback / 'Fleaman' — 2-frame springing-jump cycle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Igor-style hunchback / 'Fleaman' — 2-frame springing-jump cycle; unpredictable hopping arcs. Levels 3, 5, 6
